sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a history of intravenous drug use and current daily alcohol consumption. He also reports smoking one to two cigarettes per day. The patient states they have had hepatitis C and reports having high blood pressure and depression. He reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports having diabetes. He also reports feeling depressed.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: A grade two out of six systolic ejection murmur is appreciated. The lungs are clear without wheezes, rales or rhonchi. The patient's blood pressure is 138/82. The patient's heart rate is 78 bpm.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's primary problems include hepatitis C, depression, diabetes, high blood pressure, and left hand pain. He has a history of substance use.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will have the nurse place the orders. Schedule follow-up in two weeks to assess response to medication and monitor blood pressure.
